facebook.caption:
POV: you take a wrong turn on Lý Thường Kiệt and find the best chè in Phu Quoc.

Chè Nhà Jun-Chè Ngon Phú Quốc is pulling 4.8 stars from 277 reviews. That number doesn't lie. Cold, layered, sweet. Every bowl built properly.

Locals eat here. You should too.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
